# Engineering Methodology AI Entrypoint Manifest

## Purpose

Use this manifest for engineering methodology, workflow, validation, source-promotion, and code-development context. This domain connects wiki knowledge to practical repository execution.

## Safety Boundary

This domain is for public-safe methodology and authored synthesis. Do not add private project details, copied standards clauses, client data, credentials, or raw restricted evidence. Keep implementation guidance traceable to public-safe pages and repo-local validators.

## Start Here

- Domain schema and maintainer contract: [wikis/engineering/CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md)
- Domain index: [wikis/engineering/wiki/index.md](wiki/index.md)
- Domain overview: [wikis/engineering/wiki/overview.md](wiki/overview.md)
- Public data/software routes: [wikis/engineering/wiki/public-data-software-links.md](wiki/public-data-software-links.md)
- Tier-1 cross-links: [wikis/cross-links-tier1.md](../cross-links-tier1.md)

## Key Entry Paths

- `wikis/engineering/wiki/workflows/` — implementation-facing workflows and runbooks.
- `wikis/engineering/wiki/concepts/` — methodology concepts that should inform code and issue planning.
- `wikis/engineering/wiki/sources/` — curated source summaries for repo methodology and research signals.
- `wikis/engineering/wiki/standards/` — engineering standards metadata duplicated only when useful for method routing.
- `docs/governance/` — public/private boundary and repo operating contracts.

## How To Find X

- Engineering methods: [wikis/engineering/wiki/overview.md](wiki/overview.md)
- Public software/data sources: [wikis/engineering/wiki/public-data-software-links.md](wiki/public-data-software-links.md)
- Workflow recipes: [wikis/engineering/wiki/workflows/solver-debugging-protocol.md](wiki/workflows/solver-debugging-protocol.md)
- OrcaWave/OrcaFlex pipeline context: [wikis/engineering/wiki/workflows/orcawave-to-orcaflex-pipeline.md](wiki/workflows/orcawave-to-orcaflex-pipeline.md)
- Code and results links: [wikis/cross-links-tier1.md](../cross-links-tier1.md)

## Do Not Scan Blindly

Do not treat this domain as a generic dump of all methodology sources. Start from overview/index, pick the relevant workflow or concept, then inspect source summaries only when a claim needs provenance.

## Related Surfaces

- Marine/offshore domain context: [wikis/marine-engineering/llms.txt](../marine-engineering/llms.txt).
- Standards metadata context: [wikis/engineering-standards/llms.txt](../engineering-standards/llms.txt).
- Public/private governance: [docs/governance/service-provider-data-routing.md](../../docs/governance/service-provider-data-routing.md).
